name: fox-backend
description: Executable delivery platform backend foundation with merchant/order/realtime flows

scripts.check:openapi:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('../../docs/api/openapi.yaml').read_text()
assert 'openapi: 3.1.0' in text
assert '/merchant/orders/{orderId}/accept:' in text
assert '/customer/orders/{orderId}/tracking:' in text
print('openapi markers ok')
PY
scripts.check:schema:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('../../docs/database/schema.sql').read_text()
assert 'CREATE TABLE orders' in text
assert 'CREATE TABLE merchants' in text
print('schema ok')
PY
